description: Product Description FUPPIA Girls Dress Shoes Mary Jane Princess Shoes Give your princess a pair of Mary Jane flats, and she will be happy every time she puts them on. Detail Display of Mary Jane's Flat Dress Shoes Round Wide Toe Cap The round wide toe cap does not squeeze girls' toes.Even if worn for a long time, it will not make children feel squeezed or ground. Adjustable Strap Design The pull buckle design provides a better fit, and the adjustable strap can better adapt to the size of children's feet. Non-slip Texture The sole adopts a bow anti slip pattern that girls love, which not only conforms to the girl's innocence and romance, but also plays a role in anti slip. Bow Back Heel Bow allowing the girl wearing Mary Jane to maintain elegance while maintaining a sense of refinement. The Perfect Matching Choice for School Uniforms Girls choose this Mary Jane flat shoe as their campus shoe, with a flat design that won't get tired even after walking on campus for a whole day. The buckle design is more elegant while not falling off the heel, providing a comfortable wearing experience for girls. Paired with a uniform, it is very simple and elegant, and the butterfly design on the heel of the shoe is unique, balancing fashion and personality while being simple. It is the perfect choice for girls who love to dress up. Elegant&Practical The classic Mary Jane style is very elegant and fashionable. Can adapt to multiple occasions, whether it's school uniforms or daily clothing, it can perfectly fit. Mary Jane's girl's shoes are breathable and can be worn all year round. A Thoughtful Gift for Children Comfortable&High-Quality Paired perfectly with stockings and uniform. Wearing barefoot is also very suitable. Girls mary jane's shoes have a soft lining and sole, and are made of high-quality fabric that won't rub or heat, ensuring comfort. The adjustable hook and loop ankle strap closure, paired with a cute bow, makes it easy to put on and off, keeping your princess feet comfortable. Cute Back Bow Round Wide Toe Cap Adjustable Hook & Loop Ankle Strap Mary jane shoes are designed for wide feet,while it is also a little big. If your princess are rugular feet,we recommend AT LEAST ONE SIZE DOWN,especially size 2,size 3,size 4 and size 5.
